user.title: Connect to Contact Energy
user.description: Enter your Contact Energy account details to set up the energy integration.

data.initial_backfill_days: Initial historical data (days) - fetched on first setup to populate historical energy data
data.daily_lookback_days: Daily lookback window (days) - must be at least 3 to account for the API's 3-day data lag

contract.title: Select a Contract
contract.description: Choose the electricity contract you want to track.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect. Please check your internet connection.
